channel.title: Posts on Epistemophilia
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Epistemophilia

item.title: Head First Lexical Analysis(1)
item.description: In general, lexical analysis is the process that transform the input source program to token stream, which later will be used by parser to produce syntax tree. Nowadays, a technique called Parser Combinator may blur the boundary between parsers and lexers. However, how to use a Parser Combinator efficiently still demands a good knowledge of lexers. Besides, a Parser Combinator is LL(k), that means you have to manually eliminate left recursion.

item.title: Notes on Generating Functions and Character Polynomial
item.description: Notes on Generating Functions and Character Polynomial Generating Functions Generating Functions are formal power series that play important roles in Combinatorics. SpecificallyďĽŚ We may assume that a generating functions should look like this: $$ g(x ) = u_0+u_1x+u_2x^2+\cdots + u_nx^n+\cdots. \tag{1} $$ Suppose that there is another generating function: $$ f(x)=v_0+v_1x+v_2x^2+\cdots + v_nx^n+\cdots. \tag{2} $$ It’s easy to find that we can define the multiply two generating functions the way we define convergence:

item.title: CPS Tutorial For Kindergarteners
